```{=html}
<div style="width:88%;margin:0 auto;text-align:center;">

 <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.18em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.3em;">practice 05</div>
 <div style="font-size:1.4em;font-weight:700;color:#D45F47;line-height:1;margin-bottom:0.85em;letter-spacing:-0.01em;">Iterate the harness as the model improves.</div>

 <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.12em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.5em;">when a new Claude releases, ask:</div>

 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:0.55em;text-align:left;margin-bottom:0.85em;">
  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:12px;padding:0.7em 0.85em;border:1px solid #C4C3E8;">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#5654A2;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.25em;">Q 01</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.6em;color:#564232;line-height:1.45;">Is the planner still load-bearing?</div>
  </div>
  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:12px;padding:0.7em 0.85em;border:1px solid #C4C3E8;">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#5654A2;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.25em;">Q 02</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.6em;color:#564232;line-height:1.45;">Does the evaluator still catch what it caught last quarter?</div>
  </div>
  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:12px;padding:0.7em 0.85em;border:1px solid #C4C3E8;">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#5654A2;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.25em;">Q 03</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.6em;color:#564232;line-height:1.45;">Are sprint contracts still needed?</div>
  </div>
 </div>

 <div style="background:rgba(255,184,77,0.1);border-left:3px solid #FFB84D;border-radius:0 10px 10px 0;padding:0.55em 0.95em;font-size:0.6em;color:#564232;text-align:left;font-style:italic;">
  "The space of interesting harness combinations doesn't shrink. <strong style="color:#C4881A;">It moves.</strong>"
 </div>

</div>
```
